1.description: Read-only similarity over incident and request embeddings. Surfaces semantically and metadata-aligned peer tickets for pattern discovery, duplicate awareness, and resolution reuse. The search is anchored either by a specific record already in scope (a record id, or the active focus record) or, when no record is identified, by the problem the user describes — the described symptoms become the anchor and both incident and request are searched. The deliverable is always a set of existing peer or historical tickets, not authored guidance. Also reachable from the operator button at /api/uc02/similar-tickets. Every entry point dispatches to the same find_similar() core via the registered tool find_similar_entities. Tenant isolation is enforced as a SQL pre-filter on ai.embeddings_<service>.tenant_id and itsm.<service>.tenant_id; RBAC predicates omit candidates the caller cannot view (UC-2.7) so cross-tenant or out-of-permission rows never appear.

skills.name: Find similar tickets
skills.description: Find past incidents or requests that are semantically and metadata-similar, for duplicate detection, pattern discovery, and resolution reuse. The search is anchored either by a specific record in scope (a record id or the active focus record) or, when no record is identified, by the problem the user describes - the described symptoms become the anchor. The deliverable is always a set of OTHER existing tickets, never the focused record's own facts, authored KB/how-to guidance, or a record modification.
use_when: the user asks for tickets like a given record id (e.g. similar to INC0001001)
a contextual follow-up asking for similar or related items about the active focus record
the user describes a problem or symptoms and wants to surface other existing tickets that match it, without naming a record id
the user wants to identify other incidents that share characteristics with the current ticket
the user is looking for historical cases that resemble the current issue
the user seeks to uncover patterns by finding previous requests that are alike
the user inquires about past occurrences that are similar to the ongoing ticket
the user is interested in discovering previously reported issues that match the current situation
not_when: the user wants facts, fields, status, or timeline of the record itself (route to uc01_summarization)
the user wants external knowledge, documentation, how-to, or KB articles (route to uc03_kb_lookup)
the user wants to create, update, assign, or modify a record (route to an action/fulfilment agent)
the user wants to triage, prioritise, or route a single ticket (route to uc05_triage)
the user asks a general IT question seeking an answer, fix, or guidance for their own problem rather than asking to surface other existing tickets (route to uc03_kb_lookup)
the user wants to understand the details or status of a specific record (route to uc01_summarization)
the user seeks external knowledge or solutions related to a specific record (route to uc03_kb_lookup)
the user is asking for classification or assignment recommendations for a specific ticket (route to uc05_triage)
examples: have we seen this issue before?
other tickets with the same problem
is this a known recurring issue?
are there any past tickets like this one?
can you find incidents that are similar to this?
what other requests have we had that are like this?
show me previous cases that match this issue
have we dealt with something like this in the past?
list any related tickets to the current incident
